attributes.preview:
# SL Repo Gauntlet — Preflight Package
**Branch:** `feat/mbd4-rxiv-manuscript-942-baseline`  
**Repo:** `fjkiani/Synthetic-Lethality`  
**Audit date:** 2026-05-02  
**Auditor:** Biomni / Fahad Kiani  
**Scope:** Handoff readiness to downstream CrisPRO brain metastasis exploitation agent  
**Status of remote HEAD:** STALE — manuscript.md and SUPPLEMENTAL_DATA_PROVENANCE.md not yet updated to v3

---

## 1. Repo Scope

**What this repo is:**  
A single-gene, MBD4-centric multimodal SL analysis stack. It contains:
- A runnable SL computation engine (DepMap CRISPR stratification, Wilcoxon + BH FDR, Cohen's d)
- A pharmacologic analyzer (PRISM + GDSC stratification, MSI confound testing)
- A multimodal evidence matrix builder (7 modalities × 6 axes)
- A replication stress (RS) scorer (7 binary features, documented weights)
- A KB evidence fuser (CIViC + CGI + JAX, tier A–D, consensus boost)
- An audit queue (SQLite-backed, human-decision immutability, snippet-only promotion)
- A frozen artifact set for MBD4 (canonical_atr_wee1_rerun, cBioPortal, GDSC2 receipts)
- A manuscript (rxiv/manuscript.md) — currently STALE on remote HEAD

**What this repo is NOT:**
- A general-purpose SL engine for arbitrary genes without data loading
- A clinical decision support tool
- A validated off-label recommendation system
- A brain metastasis (BrM) specific analysis engine
- A WIWFM engine (no positioning logic, no comparator framing natively)

**Gene coverage with frozen artifacts:** MBD4 only (on this branch)  
**DDR panel v1 defines:** 50 genes across 6 sub-panels (ddr_hr, cell_cycle, ber_chromatin, replication, parp_axis, replication_stress) — code-ready but no frozen receipts for non-MBD4 genes on this branch

---

## 2. Capability Matrix

| Capability | Status | Source | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| CRISPR SL stratification (any gene) | RUNNABLE | sl_engine.py | Requires DepMap CRISPR matrix loaded at runtime |
| Wilcoxon + BH FDR + Cohen's d | VERIFIED | sl_engine.py L97–L120 | Det
